ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the policy */,
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy type */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "premium" REAL /* Monthly premium amount for the policy */,
  "coverage_limit" REAL /* Coverage limit for the policy */,
  "deductible" REAL /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_policy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type_id") REFERENCES policy_types ("policy_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "policy_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy type */,
  "base_premium_rate" REAL /* Base premium rate for the policy type */,
  "coverage_limit_range" TEXT /* Range of coverage limits for the policy type */,
  "deductible_range" TEXT /* Range of deductibles for the policy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (open/pending/closed) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "adjuster_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the adjuster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle identification number (VIN) */,
  "annual_mileage" INTEGER /* Annual mileage of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_class_id") REFERENCES vehicle_classes ("vehicle_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "vehicle_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "vehicle_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of the agent (internal/external) */,
  "agent_status" TEXT /* Status of the agent (active/inactive) */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_supervisors" (
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisor */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who filed the complaint */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date the complaint was filed */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  "complaint_status" TEXT /* Status of the complaint (open/pending/closed) */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_endorsements" (
  "endorsement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each endorsement */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the endorsement */,
  "endorsement_date" TEXT /* Date the endorsement was made */,
  "endorsement_description" TEXT /* Description of the endorsement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endorsement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the cancellation */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the cancellation was made */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_renewals" (
  "renewal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renewal */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the renewal */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the renewal was made */,
  "renewal_description" TEXT /* Description of the renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renewal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_lifetime_values" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "lifetime_value" REAL /* Lifetime value of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_premium_autos" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "monthly_premium" REAL /* Monthly premium amount for the customer's auto policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "number_of_open_complaints" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "number_of_open_complaints" INTEGER /* Number of open complaints for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_claim_amounts" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "total_claim_amount" REAL /* Total claim amount for the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_agent_map" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent assigned to the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id", "agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_policy_map" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy owned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_policy_map" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_policy_map" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id", "policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_policy_map" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complaint */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id", "policy_id")
)
